posts.author: dorkn (dorkn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I want to create a custom app that will trigger when a mirror column changes, then my custom action is to send a webhook with the whole payload,

The only issue I face is when I’m selecting the native trigger “when a column changes”, it doesn’t show me the mirror columns in the dropdown, why is that?

Thanks!

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Mirror columns are not supported as triggers for most automations, and definitely not with apps. The only automations that support mirrors as triggers are a handful of built-in automation templates you can find in the automation center under the “mirror” category.

There are possible workarounds developers have created, but I would not expect them to divulge their proprietary work, so likely you’ll need to figure out how to work around it yourself.
